entities.description: The movement of men from rural to urban areas for employment

entities.description: Regions in India experiencing significant male out-migration

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: State in India investigated for labour out-migration determinants and impacts

entities.description: State in India investigated for labour out-migration determinants and impacts

entities.name: FARM ECONOMY
entities.description: The economic system of farming affected by the migration of labour

entities.name: FAMILY SIZE
entities.description: The number of members in a family, identified as a positive determinant of migration

entities.name: EDUCATIONAL STATUS
entities.description: The level of education of family members, identified as a positive determinant of migration

entities.name: WOMEN
entities.description: Female members of migrant households who assume farm roles

entities.name: FARM ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Agricultural tasks performed on the farm

entities.name: FEMINIZATION OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The phenomenon where women take over major roles in farming due to male migration

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING ROLE
entities.description: The capacity of women to make decisions in various household and farm activities

entities.name: SELF-HELP GROUPS
entities.description: Proposed organizational structures to support out-migrants

entities.name: LABOUR SOCIETIES
entities.description: Proposed organizational structures to support out-migrants

entities.name: TRAINING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Proposed capacity building activities for women

entities.name: GIRL-CHILD EDUCATION
entities.description: Proposed focus on educating girls to improve socio-economic welfare

entities.name: RURAL INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Development of facilities in rural areas to improve welfare

entities.name: RURAL AREAS
entities.description: Areas from which labour migration originates
